test.observation: Jest ran 40 suites / 366 tests and all passed. Output still included the expected agent-store/agent-init console logging and the wallet-connect error-path console.error from the existing test harness.

typecheck.observation: tsc --noEmit completed successfully with no TypeScript diagnostics.

lint.observation: ESLint exited 0 with no warnings or errors.

blockingIssues.description: `.factory/library/ios-target-membership.md` still contains an incorrect `ios/Podfile` line citation (`line 16` instead of the actual `target`/`use_native_modules!` lines 17-18), so the exact-evidence documentation fix is not yet fully accurate.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten transcript-backed procedure enforcement so workers must record deviations whenever required mission-library reads or red→green test evidence are absent before marking `skillFeedback.followedProcedure=true`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review reports for `misc-patch-injection-polish`, `misc-pbxproj-native-modules-consistency`, `misc-vault-determinism-snapshot`, `misc-vault-circular-import-cleanup`, and `fix-vault-determinism-snapshot-multi-key-coverage` all cited transcript evidence that required library reads and/or red→green proof were missing even though the handoffs still reported `followedProcedure: true`.

rejectedObservations.observation: The repo now has a Node-subprocess workaround for exercising the ESM-only `@enbox/agent` surface under Jest.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented in the new e2e test comments and not yet strong enough to promote into shared state from scrutiny alone.

rejectedObservations.observation: The shared lint command does not encode a zero-warning contract, and the feature metadata pipeline for counting warnings fails when lint is clean.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: changing the shared command surface or rewriting feature verification snippets is an orchestrator process decision rather than a factual additive update to apply from scrutiny synthesis.

rejectedObservations.observation: Mission knowledge is missing notes about Droid-Shield false positives around `privateKeyBytes` in Jest mocks.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: this came from a single session artifact and is better promoted only if the pattern recurs across multiple workers or areas.

rejectedObservations.observation: The new `vault-constants.ts` boundary is not documented in shared mission state.
rejectedObservations.reason: already-documented inline in `src/lib/enbox/vault-constants.ts`; promoting it to shared docs is lower-priority than resolving the current blocking review findings.

rejectedObservations.observation: The new `ios-target-membership.md` note is not linked from `architecture.md`.
rejectedObservations.reason: blocked: linking it now would amplify guidance that the misc-pbxproj-native-modules-consistency review found inaccurate.
